channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLpolitics
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLpolitics, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: How the world's top AI models were revived
item.description: The battle to restore powerful AI models involved personality clashes, industry confusion, and international negotiations.

item.title: Ukraine demonstrates ability to strike nearly anywhere in Russia
item.description: The Ukrainian military is showing it can destroy a wide range of targets. Fewer places in Russia feel secure as attacks increase.

item.title: Democrats plan aggressive subpoenas over Trump's $2 billion gold rush
item.description: Democrats are preparing a tough audit of President Trump and his associates, aiming to expose and end the most lucrative presidency in history.

item.title: July 4 weekend poses extreme wildfire danger across the West
item.description: Extreme heat, drought, and dangerous fire weather are raising wildfire risks across the U.S. West heading into the July 4 weekend.
